title: Aptiv to Release Fourth Quarter 2023 Financial Results
text: DUBLIN--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Aptiv PLC (NYSE: APTV), will release its fourth quarter 2023 financial results on January 31, 2024 and will hold an investor call the same day at 8:00 a.m. EST. The call will be hosted by Aptiv's Chairman and Chief Executive Officer, Kevin Clark, and Chief Financial Officer and Senior Vice President, Business Operations, Joseph Massaro. A link to the live webcast and presentation materials will be available on the Aptiv Investor Relations website at ir.aptiv.com. A repl.
